{{Infobox character
| name = Tash
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Soulsmith (novel)|Soulsmith]]
}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Tash]] is a [[Copper]] guard.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Tash]] is a guard who uses axes.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Tash]] is a man who uses an axe.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
